query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A white race car with blue and orange accents travels on a grey racetrack. The vehicle displays the number '02' and the text 'WHITE LITES' on its side panel. It has a large rear wing and wheels with red rims. In the background, there is a green grassy area and a strip of brown earth.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A white race car with blue and orange accents speeds along a racetrack, rendered in significant motion blur that streaks the vehicle and the background. The car features the number '02' and the text 'WHITE LITES' on its side. It has a large rear wing and red-rimmed wheels. The background consists of green grass and a grey track surface, all softened and elongated horizontally by the panning motion to convey speed.
